subcodes.first_line: The Light hath appeared from the horizon of the Mount, and Sinai calleth out: "Praise be unto Thee, O Beloved of the worlds!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر النور من افق الطور و السیناء ینادی لک الحمد یا محبوب العالمین بما وجدت
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God
